name: test_vaccination_file_upload_community_clinic_name_case
description:
Test: Upload a vaccination file with community clinic name case variations and
   verify correct handling.
Steps:
1. Upload a file with clinic name case variations.
Verification:
- Output indicates clinic names are handled case-insensitively and
   imported correctly.
descriptionHtml:
Test: Upload a vaccination file with community clinic name case variations and
verify correct handling.
Steps:

  1. Upload a file with clinic name case variations.
    Verification:
  • Output indicates clinic names are handled case-insensitively and
    imported correctly.

steps.name: Log in as User(username='belljulie@example.com', password='belljulie@example.com', role='nurse') and choose team Team(name='Bennett PLC est. 1721', workgroup='A009W', careplus_venue_code='A009W', email='ubennett@example.net', phone='(07700)900631')
Log in as {1} and choose team {2}
Log in as User(username='belljulie@example.com', password='belljulie@example.com', role='nurse')

parameters.name: args
parameters.value: (User(username='belljulie@example.com', password='belljulie@example.com', role='nurse'), Team(name='Bennett PLC est. 1721', workgroup='A009W', careplus_venue_code='A009W', email='ubennett@example.net', phone='(07700)900631'))

steps.name: Click on 'HPV' session at School(name='Coppice Academy', urn='141449', site=None)
Go to Change session dates page
Go to Change session dates page
Click on Manage vaccinations in schools
Click on Manage vaccinations in schools
Click on 'HPV' session at School(name='Coppice Academy', urn='141449', site=None)
Click on Manage vaccinations in schools

testStage.description:
Test: Upload a vaccination file with community clinic name case variations and
   verify correct handling.
Steps:
1. Upload a file with clinic name case variations.
Verification:

   imported correctly.
